## [00:00 - 01:26]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents in under two minutes. Hey, just want to give you a little tip on Black Friday, okay? Black Friday is for people that don't know how to negotiate, okay? You don't know how to shop, you don't know how to negotiate, you don't know how to get a good deal, dude. Black Friday is a big hook for weak consumers. If you knew what I knew, you would never have to wait till Black Friday, whatever Black Friday, Black Sunday, the day after Christmas, the day after Thanksgiving, you would never have to wait to get a good deal. Dude, walk into your retailer, the Macy's, the Boss Store, wherever you want to go, the Cartier Store, you say, look, I don't want to wait till Black Friday, Diggity Diggity, okay? I want to do it today on Wednesday before Black Friday. I don't like freaking mobs, I don't like freaking hysterics. I ain't waiting. Who's going to do the deal? I guarantee you, Bloomingdale's, Macy's, Sears, you name it. I don't care who it is. Everybody at Walmart, they'll cut you a deal a freaking two days before. They'll set the product aside, you won't have to compete with the freaking stereo, the mobs, and the obscene nuts, so cases that go out at four o'clock in morning because of all the traffic. Look, man, your time is valuable. Okay? Don't go staying in line. Set yourself apart. Figure out how to get the attention of the retailer. I'm coming in. I don't want to do it on Friday. I want to do it on Wednesday. I'm going to hook up. These are the products I want. Cut me a deal. Look, don't make it Black Friday, man. Make it your day, not their day.
